Revenue Operations Analyst — Mid-size B2B SaaS company, Chicago (hybrid).

We're looking for a RevOps Analyst to support our growing sales org. You'll own CRM data
hygiene in Salesforce, improve lead routing and follow-up processes, build pipeline reports
for leadership, and document our sales processes as we scale. 1-3 years experience. Excel
required; SQL a plus. You'll work cross-functionally with Sales, Marketing, and CS.
